ocr_findings.description: OCR line 5 contains a spurious standalone 'A' character that does not appear anywhere in the image. This appears to be a hallucinated character likely from the decorative illustration area.

The '10進数の例' table is rendered as a 21-column single-row table in OCR. In the image it is a simple linear number sequence (0-19) with an annotation '桁が上がる (2桁になる)' below digit '10'. The annotation ends up in a separate malformed row in OCR, losing the visual association with column '10'.
Lesson intro illustration (cartoon robots/computers) replaced with img-0.jpeg reference — expected for figures.

reviewer_notes: Page is Lesson 09-01 covering 数値の数え方, introducing 10進数、2進数、and 16進数 with a number-sequence diagram. Content label is correct. The spurious 'A' character and table annotation placement are the main issues; core explanatory text is faithfully captured.
